title: Team thinking, visualized by Claude
summary: Anthropic's Claude AI was used by the Atlassian Williams F1 Team to visualize the thinking patterns of drivers and pit crew under race conditions. The system processed data on focus, judgment, and decision-making and rendered the results as visual designs displayed on helmets, race suits, and garage displays during the Monaco Grand Prix.
